_comment: FIRST STATEFUL proof: GetDataTableRowEntryCount (PD2 0xa0b0 = 41136) reads the REAL loaded global g_dwDataTableBase. Both original and reimpl scan the same live data; matching counts across rows prove the reimpl against REAL game data -- which static /emulate_function cannot provide. Counts vary by row = genuine data dependence.
name: GetDataTableRowEntryCount
